task_name: routes.ts wiring — getColumns dep + call-site update

strengths: getColumns realDep added (routes.ts:178-192) returns ColumnInfo[] with columnId/columnSlug/systemPrompt/reasoning matching the T2 interface (service.ts:49-54)
SQL uses ORDER BY position with no LIMIT (routes.ts:179-185), correctly distinguishing it from the single-row getFirstCard query
Approve route call site swapped from service.triggerExecution to service.runPipeline preserving the fire-and-forget .catch pattern and updating the log label (routes.ts:355-357)
getFirstCard realDep left untouched (routes.ts:160-176) per the sandwich constraint; only routes.ts modified in the SHA range
getColumns is pure DB access plus field mapping — no business logic, faithfully mirroring the established getFirstCard pattern

issues.description: getColumns SQL template-literal continuation lines (FROM/WHERE/ORDER BY) use a shallower indent than the surrounding getFirstCard block, creating visual inconsistency. This matches the plan's provided snippet verbatim, so it is a faithful copy and non-blocking.
